Spooky tag devs pls take note of this, your game is very fun with a chill fan base and I am a content creator trying to make this game go popular and the only thing you would have to change is the reporting, the reporting is broken, one report and your banned for 2 days, at least have a report count like let’s say 5 reports=ban like i dont want people getting banned for 2 days for no reason like I got banned for ghost trolling like that’s Stupidity, but other than that the game is 🔥

I'm writing this because a friend of mines recommended I played this, and I didn't "randomly" just download this game. I'll be so honest, people in this game are HELLA toxic and don't know how to keep things to themselves. Another thing I want to point out is that the mods are good; yes. But the issue with it is that your kinda forced into using it in public (ofc to stop noclip, etc.) this ≠ private lobbies. If it is yours, then its your rules. Today I saw the owner and he said "This game is being shut down soon" but to be fair, this game was just c+p from GTag's older build. Not to mention the amount of kids playing this game is absolutely INSANE. No work was actually put into the game, instead it's the same thing (yes, I do understand this is a fan-game ≈ doesn't update as much as expected)
Most sigma game I've ever played 5 star i wish I could do 50 stars
